result_summary: AUD-001/-002 demote T-015 from PASS to REVIEW. The historical benchmark artifact exists, but it reports affine-parameter step counts for null geodesics rather than proper time and uses a sign-mismatched flat comparator, so it is inadequate evidence for the load-bearing Kerr claim. Qualitative Kerr asymmetry remains defensible; curvature-specific channel leverage remains plausible; the reported proper-time validation is unsupported pending Contract 2.
rollback_status: Documentation-only ledger repair. Revert this commit if the audit disposition is overturned by stronger evidence; historical claims and artifact references remain preserved.
